creator: andriy@whitebox.color-pro.com
text:
Unsupported Intel p35 chipset PATA controller (only SATA with generic driver)

 >>>>>>
 atapci0@pci3:0:0:	class=0x01018f card=0x82a21043 chip=0x612111ab rev=0xb1 hdr=0x00
     vendor     = 'Marvell Semiconductor (Was: Galileo Technology Ltd)'
     class      = mass storage
     subclass   = ATA
 <<<<<<
 Bad support for ICH9 (multiple USB bugs)
 Marvell 88SE6111 PATA+SATA On-the-Go controller bug
 Unsupported onboard PCIe Gigabit LAN AI NET2
 On Marvell PATA I can`t see any HDD or ATAPI DVD 8(
 
 !Good support for ALC883 audio!

need drivers support for
ICH9
Marvell 88SE6111
Onboard LAN
How-To-Repeat: Try it
It mostly works with SATA drives not on Marvell
